lore.mega_showdown.blank_z: A blank Z-Crystal. Can be converted into a type-specific Z-Crystal.
lore.mega_showdown.booster_energy: Activates a Paradox Pokemon's ability, boosting its highest stat.
lore.mega_showdown.adamant_crystal: Transforms Dialga into its Origin Forme when held.
lore.mega_showdown.lustrous_globe: Transforms Palkia into its Origin Forme when held.
lore.mega_showdown.griseous_core: Transforms Giratina into its Origin Forme when held.
lore.mega_showdown.archie_anchor: A special Mega accessory from Team Aqua's leader.
lore.mega_showdown.ash_cap: Ash's iconic cap. Allows Bond Phenomenon with Greninja.
lore.mega_showdown.maxie_glasses: A special Mega accessory from Team Magma's leader.
lore.mega_showdown.mega_bracelet: A bracelet that allows your Pokemon to Mega Evolve in battle.
lore.mega_showdown.z_ring: A ring that allows your Pokemon to use Z-Moves in battle.
lore.mega_showdown.z_power_ring: An upgraded Z-Ring with additional power.
lore.mega_showdown.dynamax_band: A band that allows your Pokemon to Dynamax in battle.
lore.mega_showdown.tera_orb: An orb that allows your Pokemon to Terastallize in battle.
lore.mega_showdown.wishing_star: A mysterious meteorite fragment used to craft Dynamax Bands.
lore.mega_showdown.tera_shard_normal: A Tera Shard. Combine 50 to change a Pokemon's Tera Type to Normal.
lore.mega_showdown.stellar_tera_shard: A rare Stellar Tera Shard. Changes a Pokemon's Tera Type to Stellar.
